name: Appointment1
description: Implementation of the 'Appointment1' model. An appointment

ProviderId.description: If a user has Complementary and Alternative Medicine features enabled, this will allow a Provider ID to be assigned to an appointment.

Id.description: The unique ID of the appointment.

StartDateTime.description: The date and time the appointment will start.

EndDateTime.description: The date and time the appointment will end.

Notes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

PartnerExternalId.description: Optional external key for api partners.

StaffRequested.description: Whether the staff member was requested specifically by the client.

ProgramId.description: The ID of the program this appointment belongs to.

WaitlistEntryId.description: The ID of the appointment waitlist.

SessionTypeId.description: The ID of the session type of this appointment.

LocationId.description: The ID of the location where this appointment will take place.

StaffId.description: The ID of the staff member instructing this appointment.

ClientId.description: The RSSID of the client booked for this appointment.

FirstAppointment.description: Whether this is the client's first appointment at the site.

ClientServiceId.description: The ID of the pass on the client's account that is paying for this appointment.

Resources.description: The resources this appointment is using.

AddOns.description: The Add-Ons Associated with this appointment

IsWaitlist.description: Whether to add appointment to waitlist.

OnlineDescription.description: Online Description associated with the appointment
OnlineDescription.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.
